scenario.name: Basic Sipstone UAC
scenario.send: REGISTER sip:[field1] SIP/2.0 Via: SIP/2.0/[transport] [local_ip]:[local_port];branch=[branch] From: <sip:[field0]@[field1]>;tag=[call_number] To: <sip:[field0]@[field1]> Call-ID: [call_id] CSeq: 1 REGISTER Contact: <sip:[field0]@[local_ip]:[local_port];transport=[transport]>;+av.sdp.anat Supported: replaces,sdp-anat Max-Forwards: 70 Expires: 1800 User-Agent: SIPp/Linux Content-Length: 0
